news.t: Crossmark Global Investments Launches Two Active Values-Based ETFs, Managed by Industry Veteran Bob Doll

holdings.infoBox: CLCV is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 3.50%, Cisco Systems at 3.28%, Bank of America at 3.02%, Citigroup at 2.72%, and CVS Health at 2.63%.

overview.description: The Crossmark Large Cap Value ETF (CLCV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in large-cap value-oriented US companies. The fund uses a multi-factor model in stock selection with value-based screens. CLCV was launched on Jul 23, 2025 and is issued by Crossmark.

data.title: Worldwide Exchange: ETF Flows Week of September 29
data.text: CNBC's Frank Holland speaks with Robert Doll, CEO & CIO at Crossmark Global Investments, about the action in ETFs this week.

data.title: Crossmark Global Investments Launches Two Active Values-Based ETFs, Managed by Industry Veteran Bob Doll
data.text: HOUSTON , July 23, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Crossmark Global Investments, a faith-based investment management firm offering values-based strategies, has launched two actively managed exchanged-traded fund...

data.title: Crossmark's Bob Doll talks launch of two new large cap ETFs
data.text: Crossmark's Bob Doll joins 'Closing Bell Overtime' to talk the launch of Crossmark's new ETF's with focus on large cap growth and value.
